parsed_review.raw_review_summary: Scope is coherent: 11 included units RP00.P04.M07.S01-S11 map 1:1 to the 11 metadata-only catalogue entries, current_subphase advanced to S11, 11 subphase_closeouts bind to cp00-063, and next boundary M08.S01 correctly follows full closure of M07. Fail-closed design (metadata-only; rejects runtime test execution, golden generation/persistence, catalog/contract writes, raw policy/audit payload exposure, real data, secrets) matches the established CP00-058..062 pattern. All non-evidence validations pass; the only rp00:control-plane:validate FAIL is the expected pre-review missing-evidence-files condition and should clear after pack evidence is generated. No correctness risks warranting FAIL identified from the provided evidence.

p3.title: Verification basis is summary + pre-run validation only
p3.description: Per instructions no tools were used, so this review relies on the implementation summary and the pre-run validation outputs rather than direct file inspection. The provided evidence is internally consistent (syntax PASS on all 5 files, 657 node:test PASS, plan validate PASS with queue starting after CP00-062), but assembler claim-rejection logic and fixture/contract byte-equality were not independently re-derived here.
p3.required_action: Rely on the RP00 control-plane validator's assembled-result-equality, fixture-integrity, and module no-write-flag checks (which the summary states were added for CP00-063) to mechanically confirm the assertions; ensure they execute green once docs/closeout-packs/cp00-063 evidence files exist.
p3.disposition: The review was intentionally read-only with no tools; final RP00, closeout-pack, goal, weighted, requirements, full plan, npm test, and product validators provide the mechanical confirmation requested by the note.

boundary_checks.source_micro_phase_completion: RP00.P04.M07 completed; RP00.P04 open; next RP00.P04.M08.S01

notes: Claude returned PASS with one non-blocking P3 meta note about no-tool review basis.
No P0, P1, or P2 findings were reported.
The P3 note is adjudicated by relying on final mechanical validators and keeping this review as the single valid pack-level read-only review.
